apps.description: A minimal Hello World app to validate the pipeline.
apps.changelog:
## v0.0.1 — 2026-05-02

Initial release. Displays a Hello World screen to validate the end-to-end build and distribution pipeline.

apps.description: Personal Android app store. Polls a JSON manifest, downloads + verifies signed APKs, and hands them to the system installer.
apps.changelog:
## v0.3.0 — 2026-05-03

Added changeset + fixed manifest

## v0.2.0 — 2026-05-02

Initial cleanup and removed mock manifest

## v0.1.0 — 2026-05-02

Initial release. Polls the JSON manifest, downloads APKs and hands them to the system installer.
